title: Railway RRB NTPC 10+2 Under Graduate Final Result 2026 | CEN 06/2024
description: RRB Railway NTPC 10+2 Recruitment 2024: Final Result 2026 Admit Card Post Update Date: 26-05-2026 Short Description: Railway RRB NTPC Inter Level Final Result 2026: Railway Recruitment Board has announced recruitment for 3445 Posts of RRB Railway NTPC 10+2 Under Graduate Level. Candidates who want to apply online can apply from the link given on Rojgar Result. Railway RRB Inter Level Online Form 2024 can be filled from 21 September 2024 to 27 October 2024. .
